react.rules: Strictly use Vite. NEVER use npx create-react-app.
react.when_to_use: For dynamic single-page applications (SPAs) requiring a component-based architecture and a vast ecosystem.

nextjs.rules: Use App Router by default. Include Tailwind CSS.
nextjs.when_to_use: For full-stack React applications requiring Server-Side Rendering (SSR), SEO optimization, or static site generation.

vue.rules: Strictly use Vite. Prefer Composition API.
vue.when_to_use: For lightweight, highly performant web apps where a gentle learning curve and clean template syntax are prioritized.

angular.rules: Use the Angular CLI. Enforce strict TypeScript.
angular.when_to_use: For heavy, enterprise-grade applications that need a strict, opinionated, batteries-included framework.

express.rules: Standard Node setup. Ensure modern ES modules or proper CommonJS setup.
express.when_to_use: For lightweight, fast, and flexible Node.js REST APIs and microservices.

fastapi.command: python -m venv venv && venv\Scripts\activate && pip install fastapi uvicorn pydantic sqlalchemy
fastapi.rules: Standard Python virtual environment. Enforce type hinting for Pydantic.
fastapi.when_to_use: For high-performance Python APIs requiring asynchronous execution, auto-generated Swagger docs, and tight data validation.

django.command: python -m venv venv && venv\Scripts\activate && pip install django djangorestframework && django-admin startproject core .
django.rules: Standard Python virtual environment. Always include Django REST Framework for APIs.
django.when_to_use: For rapid backend development needing a built-in admin panel, ORM, and secure 'batteries-included' architecture.

springboot.command: curl -G https://start.spring.io/starter.zip -d dependencies=web,data-jpa,postgresql -d type=maven-project -o project.zip && tar -xf project.zip && del project.zip
springboot.rules: Use Spring Initializr via cURL. Ensure Maven wrapper is used.
springboot.when_to_use: For large-scale, robust, and highly secure enterprise applications relying on the Java/JVM ecosystem.

pytorch.command: python -m venv venv && venv\Scripts\activate && pip install torch torchvision torchaudio numpy pandas
pytorch.rules: Standard Python virtual environment. Ensure GPU/CUDA instructions are noted if applicable.
pytorch.when_to_use: For research-heavy AI, dynamic computation graphs, custom model architectures, and deep learning.

tensorflow.command: python -m venv venv && venv\Scripts\activate && pip install tensorflow keras numpy matplotlib
tensorflow.rules: Standard Python virtual environment. Prefer Keras API within TensorFlow.
tensorflow.when_to_use: For production-ready deep learning models, mobile deployment, and large-scale neural networks.

scikit_learn.command: python -m venv venv && venv\Scripts\activate && pip install scikit-learn pandas numpy seaborn jupyter
scikit_learn.rules: Standard Python virtual environment. Focus on data pipeline structures.
scikit_learn.when_to_use: For traditional machine learning tasks like regression, classification, clustering, and data preprocessing on tabular data.
